title: Presigned URLs
excerpt: description: Generate presigned URLs to grant temporary access to R2 objects without exposing credentials. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. Presigned URLs are an [S3 concept ↗](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/userguide/using-presigned-url.html) for granting temporary access to objects without exposing your API credentials. A presigned URL includes signature parameters in the URL itself, authorizing anyone with the URL to perform a specific operation (like `GetObject` or `PutObject`) on a specific object until the URL expires.…
